A "'''Founding Shipwright'''" was one of the major [[Starship/Legends|starship]] corporations at the dawn of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], with many of them lasting throughout most of the Old Republic's history. They included [[Core Galaxy Systems]], [[Alderaan Royal Engineers]], [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]], and possibly the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corps]].

{{Company-stub}}
